chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P No. D – 293 of 2022 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge For non-prosecution 17.04.2025 None present for the Petitioners; no intimation is received. The instant Constitutional Petition was filed in the year, 2022 and was lastly fixed in Court on 24.01.2023, thereafter no such concrete efforts were made either by the petitioners or their Counsel to pursue the matter. Today, petitioners and their Counsel are called absent without any intimation. The absence on the part of the petitioners and their Counsel prima facie suggests that either the purpose of filing instant Petition has been served or they have lost interest in pursuing the same. Accordingly, the Petition is dismissed for non-prosecution. Judge Judge ARBROHI
